info.title: ExactOnline OpenApiGenerator
info.description:
By Stef Heyenrath
Unhandled exception. PuppeteerSharp.ProcessException: Failed to launch browser! [4175:4175:0328/041231.135417:FATAL:content/browser/zygote_host/zygote_host_impl_linux.cc:132] No usable sandbox! If you are running on Ubuntu 23.10+ or another Linux distro that has disabled unprivileged user namespaces with AppArmor, see https://chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/src/+/main/docs/security/apparmor-userns-restrictions.md. Otherwise see https://chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/src/+/main/docs/linux/suid_sandbox_development.md for more information on developing with the (older) SUID sandbox. If you want to live dangerously and need an immediate workaround, you can try using --no-sandbox.
